scope.target: Immutable source packages and v0.1.0-derived target baseline
constraints: Verify with Git and file bytes
Do not scan product src/ or tests/
Do not copy source lifecycle instances

steps: Build v0.3.0 and v0.4.0 packages from immutable tags
Validate archive envelopes and source identities
Classify automatic candidates, reconciliation items, and exclusions
validation: package validators for v0.3.0 and v0.4.0
execution.last_completed_step: Verified source identities and target rollback boundary
execution.next_action: Build immutable-tag packages and produce dry-run classifications

results.residual_risk: Target predates governed package inventory, so v0.1.0 path identity alone cannot authorize replacement.
